subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Lord, the All-Bountiful, the Sovereign Possessor of Beginning and Return, Who hath ordained that which leadeth to the exaltation and elevation of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت وهاب و مالک مبدء و ماب را سزاوار که آنچه سبب ارتقا و ارتفاع وجود و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
